top_signals.title: Director of National Intelligence Chief Gabbard Is Stepping Down
top_signals.summary: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard says she is resigning to help her husband fight a rare form of bone cancer. Her last day is expected to be on June 30. She's been increasingly out of step with the White House because of her anti-war views. Bloomberg's Jeff Mason reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Reddit stock drops 6% after Meta launches standalone app for online forums
top_signals.summary: Reddit shares fell after Meta released a standalone app for Facebook Groups called Forum.
